programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Sama Kamu Emang Kadang Kiding
programme.desc: While Airin was in a coma at the hospital, Bagas (Endy Arfian) became close to Airin's sister, Zaskia (Dannia Salsabilla). As time went by, Bagas, who was initially thought to be marrying Airin, now found himself falling for Zaskia. So what will happen to Airin?

programme.title: Duren Caem Gini Masa Iya Disekip
programme.desc: A handsome widower named Doni (Kiki Farrel) has two children, a girl and a boy. Doni, who is alone after his wife passed away, actually needs a life partner, but he is reluctant to date.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Menggandakan Cinta Kamu Gak Bahaya Tah?
programme.desc: Nayla had to disguise herself as two people in order to quickly complete her vision. However, Nayla later encountered difficulties because she was playing two roles. At times she was a beautiful, wealthy woman, and at other times she was a man in order to get the job done.

programme.title: Arjuna Cintanya Gak Pernah Berchandya
programme.desc: Ayu already has a boyfriend, but Ayu's father who loves Javanese wayang stories does not like Ayu's boyfriend. Then Ayu is introduced to a handsome young man dressed as Anoman, but Ayu thinks that the young man is being manipulative towards her. programme.title: Katanya Kamu Suka Modus, Affah Iya?
programme.desc: Farel's car was seized, causing him to have to go everywhere by motorcycle. On the road, Farel met Alin who was in a hurry and suddenly jumped onto his motorcycle, but Farel's motorcycle broke down. Alin and Farel met again at campus because Farel was accused of spying in the women's restroom. Farel holds a grudge against Alin and often plays pranks on her. Will they fall in love?

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Mendang Mending Tar Bilek Lagi
programme.desc: A couple named Sam and Alea who once dated during high school ended up breaking up. Recently, they have become close again because they both feel incompatible with their current partners. So what is the story of their reunion?

programme.title: Sejauh Ini Yang Paling Jauh Adalah Nyariin Kamu
programme.desc: Luna is betrothed by her mother to a wealthy and possessive man named Baim. Luna, who outright refuses the arrangement, shows her dislike for Baim in front of her mother. One day, Luna boldly runs away from home and accidentally gets into a car owned by Akbar. What happens next?

programme.title: Cinta Suci Gadis Keong Mas
programme.desc: Livi's 21st birthday party becomes the trigger for a conflict between Livi and Hana, her half-sister. The tension and rising emotions between them add an interesting element to the story, in which Livi and Marina, Hana's stepmother, plan to evict Hana from their home.

programme.title: Emang Boleh Punya Senyum Selucu Itu
programme.desc: Lili, Rio's mistress, is pregnant and meets Nisa. Nisa is very angry and disappointed with Rio until their relationship eventually ends. Nisa heals her broken heart by going hiking with Fajar. Journalists continue to pursue Nisa and assume that Fajar is her new crush.

programme.title: Kukira Putus Ternyata Love You Terus
programme.desc: Eve has to face an annoying boss. The boss refuses to accept anything from her if she is late. If Eve is even one minute late, the boss will scold her. One day, in a fit of anger, Eve insults her boss for always being single. However, one night, Eve finds her boss on the rooftop and mistakenly believes that her boss is trying to end her life. What happens next?

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Kentucky's Octagon Hall is known for its paranormal activity, but that activity has turned violent following the death of the museum's founder; staff and guests are scared out of their minds, and the director Barry fears he'll have to shut it down.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Toledo, Ohio, where a family faces a daily onslaught of aggressive paranormal activity; Steve uncovers a grisly string of murders committed near the property, while Amy encounters a twisted spirit intent on harming the living.

programme.title: Yuletide Yeti
programme.desc: A cryptozoologist treks deep into the remote Alaskan wilderness in search of scientific proof of Bigfoot; a mysterious vortex of energy may be behind unexplained disappearances in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Yeti Massacre
programme.desc: In the winter of 1959, the mutilated bodies of nine hikers were found in the Ural Mountains of Russia; investigating the possibility that they were slaughtered in cold blood by a yeti.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates steps into the past to examine unsolved mysteries; featuring the alleged alien abduction of Travis Walton, the bizarre death of American hero Charles Lindbergh's son, and the invisible attacks visited upon CIA operatives in Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests Jack the Ripper's identity, while DNA analysis indicates possible Yeti existence; Max Headroom interrupts live broadcast, surprising everyone.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the alleged curse behind King Tut's tomb explorers' deaths, the Dyatlov Pass incident where 9 hikers died mysteriously and an influencer's disappearance in Nevada desert, investigating potential supernatural links.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: In 1590, the settlers of Roanoke vanished without a trace; new evidence finally reveals what happened; archaeologists investigate what destroyed the original Sin City, Sodom; a new theory suggests Stonehenge may be more than it seems.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh examines clues left by the Zodiac Killer, the location of Forrest Fenn's million-dollar buried treasure, and the Voynich Manuscript.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A new study suggests the Shroud of Turin may be authentic, while researchers analyze old ghost photos with new tools; the creator of the Georgia Guidestones is identified.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates conspiracy theories, including new discoveries suggesting the Titanic was sunk by more than just an iceberg, the true story behind the death of Harry Houdini and lost Civil War gold that spawned a lawsuit against the FBI.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates several mysterious tragedies and downfalls; an expedition crew goes insane, turning cannibalistic; an explorer searches for a lost city in the Brazilian rainforest; an aspiring young actress falls victim to a deranged killer.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: The truth about serial killer H.H. Holmes's death may be exposed by one of his descendants; did the government conspire with the mafia about a mysterious helicopter crash?

programme.title: Expedition Files

programme.desc: Josh Gates looks closely at some of history's most intriguing hoaxes and unexplained events, including the Amityville Horror, the strange fate of a military submarine crew, and a phenomenon in which people's body fat causes them to burn alive.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe
programme.desc: Jack pushes Ozzy and Sharon to question reality with a ghostly canine, a Canadian Bigfoot and a UFO sighting that hits too close to home for the Osbournes' comfort.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe

programme.desc: Jack, Sharon and Ozzy debate if mirrors can be haunted and whether aliens use cloud cloaking technology. Plus, the size of Bigfoot's feet.

programme.title: Odd Squad

programme.title: Wild Kratts

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: Keda, the young son of a tribe chief, is accidentally left behind and must survive in the wilderness. He then encounters an injured wolf abandoned by its pack and the two form a bond.

programme.title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
programme.desc: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: As the March sisters enter the threshold of womanhood, they go through many ups and downs in life and endeavour to make important decisions that can affect their future.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: Three delinquents break into the house of Norman, a Gulf War veteran who is visually impaired, to steal his money. However, they discover that Norman is not as helpless as he seems.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie, a journalist, is determined to expose the Life Foundation, for performing unethical experiments on humans. During his investigation, a symbiotic alien merges with him, ensuing chaos.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
